description: Validate a .pptx file (or an unpacked directory) against the OOXML ISO/IEC 29500 XSD schemas plus PPTX-specific checks: namespace correctness, unique/UUID IDs, file references, slideLayout references, content types, notes-slide references, and no duplicate slide layouts. Read-only — reports pass/fail and never mutates the input.
rules: read-only — never modifies PPTX_PATH (auto-repair is NOT enabled by this porter)
requires defusedxml + lxml plus the vendored schemas/ tree; degrades gracefully when absent
the validation report is captured to validate.log under record_store
usage: Set PPTX_PATH (a .pptx file or an unpacked dir). Output: validate.log (PASSED/FAILED report with per-error detail).
limitation: Reports only; does not repair. Redlining validation is DOCX-only and skipped for .pptx.
